feedback: APPROVE. PRD is comprehensive: clear problem, testable goals, granular US↔FR traceability, safety model preserved (L0 default, typed-CONFIRM, 24h delay non-negotiable), risks with mitigations, explicit open questions. Minor accuracy nit: repo path for TS2493 evidence should be plugins/autonomous-dev-homelab/tests/cli/test-safety-cli.test.ts:133 (not tests/cli/...). Non-blocking; can be corrected in TDD/plan. Open questions Q-01..Q-04 flagged blocking-for-implementation but explicit assumptions handling is documented.

findings.message: File path evidence 'tests/cli/test-safety-cli.test.ts:133' should be prefixed with 'plugins/autonomous-dev-homelab/' to match actual repo layout; content of line 133 (audit.mock.calls[0]?.[0]) is consistent with a TS2493 tuple-index diagnostic.

Q-01..Q-04 are marked blocking for downstream FRs but the PRD notes assumptions should be revisited in review; recommend resolving these with the operator before TDD to avoid churn in FR-SEC-02, FR-CONN-01, FR-BLD-04, FR-UI-01.
